ACCEPTED - Enum constant in enum class com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry.Status
 
AccessibilityUtils - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Utilities for adapting the UI when system-level touch exploration (TalkBack, Switch Access, etc.) is active.
AdminBrowseImagesActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Admin screen for browsing and deleting event poster images (US 03.03.01).

No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
AdminBrowseImagesAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Adapter that populates a GridView with event poster images.
AdminBrowseImagesAdapter(Context, ArrayList<Event>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminBrowseImagesAdapter
Creates a new adapter for the given event list.
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Activity for administrators to browse and delete all profiles (Entrants and Organizers).
AdminBrowseProfilesActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminBrowseProfilesActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
AdminBrowseProfilesAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Adapter to display mixed profiles and handle profile removal.
AdminBrowseProfilesAdapter(Context, ArrayList<Entrant>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminBrowseProfilesAdapter
Creates a new adapter for the given profile list.
AdminEventControlScreenActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Admin view: list all events from Firestore, search by title (in-memory).
AdminEventControlScreenActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminEventControlScreenActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.
AdminEventControlScreenAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Adapter for AdminEventControlScreenActivity event list.
AdminEventControlScreenAdapter(Context, ArrayList<Event>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminEventControlScreenAdapter
this is the constructor for the admin event control screen adapter
AdminMainScreenActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Admin hub screen that provides navigation to the admin sub-screens: event control, profile browse, image browse, notification log, and admin profile.
AdminMainScreenActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminMainScreenActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.

No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.

Adapter for AdminProfileControlScreenActivity: Row click will directs to profile detail screen.

this is the constructor for the admin profile control screen adapter
AdminNotificationLogItemTemporary - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Class is used to temporarily store admin notification item records all the notification information title, message, sender, related event, send time used when displaying admin notification log information screen

AdminProfile - Class in com.example.eventlottery
This class holds admin profile fields stored in Firestore at admins/{adminId}.
AdminProfile() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminProfile
No-arg constructor for Firestore deserialization.
AdminProfileActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Edit the signed-in admin's profile (firstName, lastName, email, optional phone) in Firestore admins/{deviceId}.
AdminProfileActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.AdminProfileActivity
No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.

No-arg constructor required by the Android Activity lifecycle.

this is the constructor for the admin profile control screen adapter
AdminProfileItemTemporary - Class in com.example.eventlottery
temporarily store profile information stores either a organizer profile or entrant profile organizers the id stores the organizer id entrants the id stores the device id
